name: get_commitment_basic_info
description: Get basic information about a Compute Engine Commitment, including its name, ID, status, plan, type, resources, and creation, start and end timestamps. Requires project, region, and commitment name as input.

parameters.description: Request message for getting a region commitment.

name.description: Required. Identifier. Name of the commitment to return.

project.description: Required. Project ID for this request.

region.description: Required. The region of the commitment.
